supersedes: ad hoc source notes in prior SAFE_FAST result files

rules.setup_labels_source: SAFE_FAST frozen local rule engine only

entries.plain_english_meaning: Underlying hourly open, high, low, close, and volume bars used as raw market input.
entries.secondary_source: Schwab price-history API only after read-only capability audit; TradingView export is manual secondary evidence only
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab for live quote decisions after audit; Databento does not override live Schwab state
entries.historical_authority: Databento DBEQ.BASIC ohlcv-1h
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use vendor event timestamp converted to UTC for storage and America/New_York for RTH decision display; Databento end timestamps are exclusive.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Use only bars with event timestamps at or before the decision timestamp.
entries.credential_requirement: Databento API key required for new cost checks/downloads; resolver requires no credential.
entries.entitlement_requirement: Databento DBEQ.BASIC entitlement required for new data.
entries.cost_check_requirement: Required before any new Databento download.
entries.fallback_behavior: If Databento is unavailable, use audited Schwab price history only after capability proof; otherwise classify exact candidate field unavailable.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT; do not average bars from conflicting sources.

entries.plain_english_meaning: The exact source-backed bar or replay row used as the setup decision row.
entries.primary_source: SAFE-FAST frozen local rule engine using source-backed underlying rows
entries.dataset_schema_api_series_endpoint_or_ca: historical_signal_replay.signal_replay and setup-family calculators over underlying_ohlcv_1h
entries.secondary_source: Manual reviewer-completed setup-time review packets only when exact rows are present
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local engine for labels; Schwab does not provide SAFE-FAST setup labels
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local replay over Databento or accepted source rows
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Decision row must be at or before signal timestamp; display in America/New_York and store UTC-capable ISO timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No future rows, outcomes, fills, or later labels may select the setup row.
entries.credential_requirement: None for local replay; source-row acquisition may require vendor credentials outside resolver.
entries.entitlement_requirement: Underlying source entitlement required only for new acquisition.
entries.cost_check_requirement: Required only when acquiring missing underlying rows from paid vendors.
entries.fallback_behavior: Use exact setup-time review completion packet; if no exact row exists, exclude the candidate rather than leaving it indefinitely unresolved.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT; require chronological replay or reviewer packet to resolve.

entries.plain_english_meaning: The setup-specific trigger level and trigger basis accepted at the decision timestamp.
entries.secondary_source: Reviewer completion packet only when it cites exact source rows and accepted rule version
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local engine
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local replay
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Trigger basis must be computed from rows available no later than the decision timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No revised or post-outcome trigger repair is allowed.
entries.credential_requirement: None for calculation after source rows exist.
entries.cost_check_requirement: No cost check for calculation; source-row acquisition still follows vendor cost rules.
entries.fallback_behavior: If no accepted trigger can be calculated, the setup label is blocked.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT; do not pick the favorable trigger.

entries.plain_english_meaning: The setup-specific failure or invalidation level and basis accepted at the decision timestamp.
entries.secondary_source: Reviewer completion packet only with exact rows and accepted rule version
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local engine
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local replay
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Invalidation basis must be computed from rows available no later than the decision timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No later recovery, failure, or outcome may define setup-time invalidation.
entries.credential_requirement: None for local calculation.
entries.fallback_behavior: If invalidation cannot be calculated, block setup qualification.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Whether the setup is fresh, spent, stale, duplicate, pending, or final at the decision timestamp.
entries.secondary_source: Reviewer completion packet only when accepted lifecycle rule is cited
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local engine
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local replay
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use only lifecycle rows at or before decision timestamp; session-boundary cases must name the boundary.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No future continuation, later rebound, or later failure may decide freshness.
entries.credential_requirement: None for calculation.
entries.fallback_behavior: If freshness is contradictory, mark SOURCE_CONFLICT or exclude the candidate.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Setup-time blocker and caution decision across technical, 24H, macro, volatility, event, and headline context.
entries.primary_source: SAFE-FAST context/caution calculator over exact source fields
entries.dataset_schema_api_series_endpoint_or_ca: historical_signal_replay.context_caution_calculator plus official macro/news/volatility sources as inputs
entries.secondary_source: Manual review packet only when every input source is named
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local engine for decision; Schwab live quotes only for Schwab-executed decisions after audit
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local replay using historical-vintage source inputs
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Every input must be timestamped at or before decision timestamp in its native timezone and normalized to UTC.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Macro values must come from ALFRED or release-time official values; revised present-day values cannot silently replace historical vintages.
entries.credential_requirement: Benzinga credentials required only for timestamped headline API; official public sources may not require credentials.
entries.entitlement_requirement: Benzinga entitlement required for API headlines; vendor-displayed IV/Greeks require source entitlement.
entries.cost_check_requirement: Required before paid vendor headline or market-data acquisition.
entries.fallback_behavior: Optional context cannot block unless a frozen rule makes it mandatory; mandatory blocker inputs block trade eligibility, not a technical setup label.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT; official releases control over headline providers.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Evidence that the setup decision used only information available at the decision timestamp.
entries.primary_source: SAFE-FAST frozen replay fixtures and signal logs
entries.secondary_source: Reviewer packet with exact row boundary and no future rows
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local engine
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local replay
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Boundary is the decision timestamp; all consumed rows must be less than or equal to it.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Future outcome, fill, P&L, and later labels are prohibited.
entries.credential_requirement: None.
entries.cost_check_requirement: No cost check for local proof.
entries.fallback_behavior: If no boundary proof exists, block setup qualification.

entries.plain_english_meaning: How a setup behaves across same-session, prior-session, next-session, invalidation, and duplicate lifecycle boundaries.
entries.secondary_source: Reviewer packet only with accepted session-boundary rule and exact rows
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local engine
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local replay
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Session boundary is New York regular trading session unless a rule explicitly defines otherwise.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Later session outcomes cannot reclassify the prior decision.
entries.credential_requirement: None.
entries.fallback_behavior: If the boundary is unclear, classify SOURCE_CONFLICT and exclude until resolved.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Option contract identity: raw symbol, instrument id, strike, expiration, and call/put type.
entries.secondary_source: Schwab option-chain API and tastytrade option-chain checks after capability validation
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab for live tradability in Schwab account
entries.historical_authority: Databento OPRA.PILLAR definition
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Definition ts_event must be at or before decision timestamp; UTC storage.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Use listing state known by the decision timestamp.
entries.credential_requirement: Databento API key for new historical downloads; Schwab/tastytrade credentials only for audited secondary checks.
entries.cost_check_requirement: Required before new Databento option definition download.
entries.fallback_behavior: If identity cannot be proven, do not select a contract.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Exact option bid/ask updates and quote age for entry, rejection, and quote freshness gates.
entries.secondary_source: Databento OPRA.PILLAR cbbo-1s only after explicit validation; Schwab quote and tastytrade quote as secondary verification
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab for live Schwab decisions and actual submitted order context
entries.historical_authority: Databento OPRA.PILLAR cmbp-1
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use quote ts_event at or before decision timestamp; quote age is decision timestamp minus quote ts_event.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Future quote rows are rejected.
entries.credential_requirement: Databento API key for new downloads.
entries.fallback_behavior: If cmbp-1 is unavailable, use cbbo-1s only when field-specific validation exists; TCBBO alone cannot establish quote freshness.

entries.plain_english_meaning: One-second quote fallback when explicitly validated for a field and candidate.
entries.secondary_source: None until a task validates a candidate-specific fallback
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab for live quotes
entries.historical_authority: Databento OPRA.PILLAR cbbo-1s only after validation
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use one-second bucket at or before decision timestamp only.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No future quote bucket may be used.
entries.credential_requirement: Databento API key.
entries.fallback_behavior: Cannot be used unless an explicit validation test names this fallback.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Trade-linked best bid/offer context around option trades.
entries.secondary_source: cmbp-1 or cbbo-1s for quote freshness; tcbbo is supplemental only
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab actual fills override all supplemental quote context
entries.historical_authority: Databento OPRA.PILLAR tcbbo as supplemental evidence
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use ts_event at or before decision timestamp for context only.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Cannot be sole quote freshness source.
entries.credential_requirement: Databento API key.
entries.fallback_behavior: Use for supplemental review only; if no quote-freshness source exists, execution remains blocked.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Option trade prints and setup-time-safe volume evidence.
entries.secondary_source: Schwab and tastytrade option quote/chain checks after audit when available
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab for actual fills; vendor trades do not override fill records
entries.historical_authority: Databento OPRA.PILLAR trades
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use trade ts_event at or before decision timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No post-signal trades may prove setup-time volume.
entries.credential_requirement: Databento API key.
entries.fallback_behavior: If volume is required and unavailable, no contract is selected.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Option volume, open interest, and statistics fields used by liquidity gates.
entries.secondary_source: Schwab or tastytrade option-chain display after capability validation
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab for live tradability checks
entries.historical_authority: Databento OPRA.PILLAR statistics
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use statistic ts_event at or before decision timestamp; prior-day OI exceptions require accepted rule.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No revised current OI may backfill historical setup-time OI.
entries.credential_requirement: Databento API key.
entries.fallback_behavior: If required statistics are absent and no accepted exception applies, abstain from contract selection.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Actual live submitted order fill, quantity, price, commission, and execution record.
entries.dataset_schema_api_series_endpoint_or_ca: Schwab Trader API orders, transactions, positions, balances, and fills endpoints after read-only audit
entries.secondary_source: None for actual Schwab fills
entries.live_authority: Charles Schwab
entries.historical_authority: Charles Schwab for account/order/fill history when available
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use Schwab execution timestamps; preserve original timezone and normalize to UTC for audit.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Actual fill records are authoritative for what happened in the Schwab account.
entries.credential_requirement: Schwab OAuth token stored outside Git and outside tracked repo files; resolver never reads token.
entries.cost_check_requirement: No market-data cost check; OAuth/user authorization required.
entries.local_cache_location: future local Schwab archive outside raw vendor folders; exact path to be defined by Schwab audit
entries.fallback_behavior: Databento, tastytrade, and TradingView cannot override an actual Schwab fill.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: Schwab fill controls; conflicting vendor data is supplemental only.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Locally calculated realized volatility from underlying market data.
entries.secondary_source: Vendor-displayed realized volatility only as review evidence
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local calculation for SAFE-FAST context
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local calculation from historical underlying bars
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use bars available at or before decision timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No future bars may enter the realized-volatility window.
entries.credential_requirement: None after source rows exist.
entries.fallback_behavior: Missing optional realized volatility cannot block setup unless a frozen rule makes it mandatory.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT if vendor display contradicts local inputs; local formula must be audited.

entries.plain_english_meaning: SAFE-FAST calculated option implied volatility and Greeks from complete option and underlying inputs.
entries.dataset_schema_api_series_endpoint_or_ca: option IV/Greeks calculator from quote, underlying price, strike, expiration, interest-rate input, and dividend input
entries.secondary_source: Schwab and tastytrade displayed IV/Greeks as secondary verification after audit
entries.live_authority: SAFE-FAST local calculation for SAFE-FAST context; Schwab display may inform live review after audit
entries.historical_authority: SAFE-FAST local calculation from Databento option and underlying inputs
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: All inputs must be at or before decision timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Interest-rate and dividend inputs must be historical-vintage or marked unavailable.
entries.credential_requirement: None for calculation after inputs exist.
entries.entitlement_requirement: Market-data entitlements required for inputs only.
entries.fallback_behavior: Vendor-displayed IV/Greeks cannot silently replace calculated values.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Official market-volatility index context: VIX/VIX9D for SPY, VXN for QQQ, RVX for IWM, GVZ for GLD.
entries.dataset_schema_api_series_endpoint_or_ca: Cboe VIX, VIX9D, VXN, RVX, and GVZ series
entries.secondary_source: Schwab and tastytrade displayed volatility context after audit
entries.live_authority: Cboe for official index values; Schwab display is secondary
entries.historical_authority: Cboe historical index value as of decision timestamp
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use index value timestamp at or before decision timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: No revised/current display may silently replace historical index value.
entries.credential_requirement: None unless a chosen API requires credentials.
entries.entitlement_requirement: Cboe/API entitlement if required by access method.
entries.fallback_behavior: If optional and missing, do not block setup; if a future frozen rule requires it, block trade eligibility with exact field.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT; Cboe controls over broker display.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Official filings and scheduled event context from SEC, Federal Reserve, BLS, BEA, Treasury, and issuer IR.
entries.primary_source: Official issuing agency or issuer investor-relations source
entries.dataset_schema_api_series_endpoint_or_ca: SEC EDGAR; Federal Reserve releases/FOMC; BLS CPI/PPI/employment/unemployment/JOLTS; BEA GDP/PCE/income/spending; Treasury official data; issuer IR releases
entries.secondary_source: Schwab news and TradingView news/economic calendar as manual verification
entries.live_authority: Official issuing agency controls event truth when conflict exists
entries.historical_authority: Official release timestamp and contents as of candidate date
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use official release timestamp and normalize to UTC; preserve source timezone.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Use contents known at release time, not later revisions unless revision timing is explicitly part of the field.
entries.credential_requirement: None for public official pages unless an API is later chosen.
entries.entitlement_requirement: None for public official pages unless an API is later chosen.
entries.fallback_behavior: Official releases control over headline provider conflicts; missing optional event context cannot block a setup unless a frozen rule requires it.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Timestamped market or issuer headline context available at the candidate decision timestamp.
entries.primary_source: Benzinga API when entitlement and credentials are available
entries.secondary_source: Schwab news and TradingView news as manual verification
entries.live_authority: Official issuing agency controls if headline conflicts with release source
entries.historical_authority: Timestamped headline provider only when entitlement and timestamp semantics are validated
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Headline timestamp must be at or before decision timestamp and normalized to UTC.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Later headlines cannot backfill setup-time context.
entries.credential_requirement: Benzinga credential required for API use; resolver never reads credentials.
entries.cost_check_requirement: Required before paid headline API acquisition.
entries.fallback_behavior: If optional and unavailable, do not block technical setup; if frozen rule requires headline review, block trade eligibility.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT; official source controls over headline provider.

entries.plain_english_meaning: Macroeconomic values as they were known on the candidate date.
entries.dataset_schema_api_series_endpoint_or_ca: ALFRED series vintage endpoint for macro series
entries.secondary_source: FRED, issuing agency official release, Federal Reserve, BLS, BEA, and Treasury
entries.live_authority: Issuing agency for official release; ALFRED for historical vintage reconstruction
entries.historical_authority: ALFRED vintage value as of decision timestamp
entries.timestamp_timezone_rule: Use vintage/release timestamp at or before decision timestamp.
entries.historical_vintage_rule: Revised present-day macro values cannot silently replace historical vintages.
entries.credential_requirement: ALFRED/FRED API key only if chosen access method requires it.
entries.entitlement_requirement: Public API access limits apply if used.
entries.cost_check_requirement: Required before paid macro API acquisition.
entries.fallback_behavior: If no vintage can be proven, mark exact macro field unavailable; do not substitute revised current value.
entries.source_conflict_behavior: SOURCE_CONFLICT; issuing agency release and ALFRED vintage timing must be reconciled.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: Downloaded OHLCV can support raw bars but cannot accept a setup-time row, trigger, invalidation, freshness, blocker/caution, or no-hindsight decision.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: Only after exact setup-time row and accepted rule inputs are present.
current_candidate_blockers.separate_official_news_macro_source_need: Only for blocker/caution context; not for technical setup label unless a frozen rule requires it.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: No second exact GLD Ideal source window and row range is repo-backed.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: No; candidate lacks exact source window.
current_candidate_blockers.separate_official_news_macro_source_need: No until an exact source window exists.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: OHLCV bars do not create an accepted Clean Fast Break setup-time candle or replay row.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: Possible only through accepted CFB replay/calculator with exact row boundary.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: OHLCV does not resolve the 2026-04-07 invalidation/recovery and freshness conflict.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: Only after accepted Continuation lifecycle/session-boundary rule resolves the conflict.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: OHLCV does not prove freshness versus same-lifecycle follow-through after 2026-04-30.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: Only after accepted Continuation duplicate/freshness rule.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: OHLCV does not prove fresh Continuation versus same rebound context after QQQ lines 66-86.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: Only after accepted Continuation same-context rule.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: Downloaded OHLCV supports bars but not accepted Continuation setup decisions.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: Only after exact setup-time row and accepted Continuation fields are completed.

current_candidate_blockers.ohlcv_resolution_note: Downloaded OHLCV supports bars but not accepted session-boundary setup-time decisions.
current_candidate_blockers.local_calculation_possible: Only after exact session-boundary setup-time row and accepted Continuation fields are completed.
